text:
Jack Dahlgren

Former Missouri star Jack Dahlgren finished sixth in the 200-meter butterfly finals with a time of 1 minute, 56.63 seconds at the U.S. Olympic Swimming Trials on Wednesdayat Lucas Oil Stadiumin Indianapolis.

Dahlgren was 1.55 seconds away from qualifying for the Summer Olympics, needing to be one of the top-two finishers in the eight-man finals. Thomas Heilman (1:54.50) and Luca Urlando (1:55.50) finished first and second, respectively, and will represent the U.S. in the event in Paris next month.

title: Former Mizzou swimmer Dahlgren places sixth in 200 butterfly finals at U.S. Olympic Trials | Pro Sports | columbiamissourian.com
author: Missourian Staff
description: Jack Dahlgren was 1.55 seconds away from qualifying for the Summer Games. He needed to be one of the top-two finishers in Wednesday's eight-man finals.
